name: AT&T INC.
summary: AT&T Inc. is a leading global telecommunications and technology services holding company. It provides wireless services (4G LTE and 5G), fiber broadband, fixed wireless access (AT&T Internet Air), and wireline telecom to consumers and businesses. Key offerings include Mobility (postpaid, prepaid, reseller), Consumer Wireline (AT&T Fiber), Business Wireline (ethernet, IP Voice, managed services), and wireless services in Mexico under the Latin America segment. AT&T also operates FirstNet, a broadband network dedicated to public safety.

products.name: AT&T 5G Wireless Service
products.description: Nationwide 5G wireless voice and data service covering over 322 million people in the U.S.

products.name: AT&T Fiber
products.description: Fiber-based broadband service offering multi-gig speeds to residential customers; 10.4 million customers as of Dec 31, 2025.

products.name: AT&T Internet Air (AIA)
products.description: Fixed wireless access internet service delivered over the 5G wireless network; 1.5 million connections as of Dec 31, 2025.

products.name: FirstNet
products.description: Nationwide wireless broadband network dedicated to public safety customers.

products.name: Cricket Wireless
products.description: Prepaid wireless service brand offering monthly prepaid voice and data plans.

products.name: AT&T PREPAID
products.description: Prepaid wireless voice and data service brand offered by AT&T Mobility.

products.name: Business Wireline Services
products.description: Advanced ethernet-based fiber, fixed wireless, IP Voice, and managed professional services for business customers.

products.name: AT&T Mexico Wireless
products.description: Wireless service and equipment provided in Mexico under the Latin America segment.

products.name: Wireless Handsets and Devices
products.description: Handsets, wireless data cards, computing devices, and accessories sold via stores, agents, and online.

products.name: Software Defined Network (SDN)/NFV Platform
products.description: Virtualized, software-based network infrastructure supporting 5G and broadband next-generation applications.

partnerships.description: Formed DIRECTV Entertainment Holdings, LLC joint venture in July 2021; AT&T sold remaining interest to TPG in July 2025.
Pending spectrum acquisition transaction to expand wireless network capacity for fixed wireless and 5G services.
Pending acquisition of substantially all of Lumen's Mass Markets fiber business to accelerate fiber expansion.
